description: Register a new external service integration. Creates a service preset and stores auth credentials under the tenant's confidential namespace.

service_id.description: Unique identifier for the service (e.g. notion, slack, github). Used as the preset filename.

tenant.description: Target tenant slug. Credentials will be stored under knowledge/confidential/{tenant}/.

base_url.description: Base URL for the service API. Leave empty to use the service's default.

notes: After applying, run `pnpm vital` to verify the service appears in the active-services registry.
